_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Develop an organizational change management plan to support a data management strategy.
reference_document_element_description: Knowledge of organizational change management principles as applied to large-scale data and AI transformation programs, including adoption barriers, culture change levers, and executive sponsorship requirements.
comments: DCWF task equal WIDAI LS domain. LS-K-002 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: LS-T-002 (LS, cosine: 0.617), OP-K-003 (OP, cosine: 0.617).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 5.1/10 (raw 0.507). Shared vocabulary: [change, data, management, organizational]. DCWF-only terms [develop, plan, strategy, support] vs WIDAI-only terms [adoption, ai, applied, barriers, culture, executive] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.896 (P=0.920, R=0.874). P exceeds R by 0.046 — the DCWF element's 12 words are well-captured by the WIDAI KSA's 25 words, but the KSA contains additional specificity not reflected in the DCWF element.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: neutral-dominant (100.0%). "Develop an organizational change management plan to support a data management st" and "Knowledge of organizational change management principles as applied to large-sca" are related but neither implies nor contradicts the other. Standard result for cross-framework mapping where two independent frameworks describe overlapping competencies with independent vocabulary.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.706 > STS 0.507 (gap +0.199). Independent encoding finds more similarity than cross-attention. Shared surface terms [change, data, management, organizational] inflate the bi-encoder, but cross-attention detects semantic divergence beneath the vocabulary overlap.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 16.7%. Shared tokens: [change, data, management, organizational]. DCWF-only: [develop, plan, strategy, support]. WIDAI-only: [adoption, ai, applied, barriers, culture, executive].
